meaning: n.枯燥乏味的文章、思想,精神食量
examples: Life went on, and when Markus was six months old, Brooks fed him his first food: a pablum containing dairy products.
Now, with Obama back to his populist Pablum, our economy and stock market are stuck again in idle.
And yet so much of what I get pitched is pablum.
Books about major athletes are often authorized pablum or arm's-length agglomerations.
